releaseNotes: v0.24.21 — fixes the v0.24.20 loophole exposed by the v0.24.19 manifest's missing-comma JSON bug: a failed/unreachable manifest fetch no longer suppresses the next 24h retry. v0.24.20 (all the audit findings from the May 12 round-3 pass) is still the canonical changelog; v0.24.21 is a small follow-up so a single bad manifest never locks the app out of auto-updating for a day. 392 tests passing.
